hero.name: Karthika Arumugam
hero.title: Senior Product Engineering Leader
hero.subTitle: AI‑powered digital transformation | Driving digital transformation with precision and passion

about_me.resumeSummary: With 13 years of experience in software development and leadership, I’ve led teams to modernize legacy systems, scale enterprise applications, and align technology strategy with business goals. My expertise spans cloud-native architectures, DevOps, Agile development, system architecture, API integrations, CI/CD automation, and cloud migrations. I’ve delivered high-impact solutions across hospitality, travel, and enterprise tech, always focused on operational efficiency, security compliance, and enhancing user experiences.
about_me.title: Engineering Leader | Building Scalable Solutions & Empowering Teams
about_me.subtitle: Driving digital transformation, technical excellence, and inclusive growth.
summary: I am a Product Engineering Manager with over 13 years of experience in leading high-stakes digital transformations. My career has been defined by a simple goal: making technology work better for the people who use it. Whether I am architecting global cloud systems at Hyatt or guiding a team through a complex technical migration, I focus on building software that is scalable, secure, and genuinely aligned with business needs.
background: My leadership style is rooted in technical excellence and strategic foresight. I specialize in taking legacy complexity—what many call "spaghetti code"—and modernizing it into clean, cloud-native architectures. Recently, I have focused on Generative AI adoption, exploring how these tools can meaningfully streamline developer workflows and create smarter, more intuitive guest experiences without sacrificing security or stability.

Beyond the technical roadmaps, I am a dedicated mentor. I believe that the strongest products are built by teams that feel empowered and psychologically safe. I focus on creating inclusive engineering cultures where innovation isn't just encouraged, but a natural part of the daily routine.
about_me.hobbies:
When I’ m not leading technical roadmaps or geeking out over technologies, I’ m focused on my most important role: being a mom of two.
Parenthood has genuinely made me a stronger leader.It has refined my ability to prioritize under pressure, lead with deep empathy, and stay calm during "system outages"— whether they happen in a codebase or at the dinner table.You’ ll often find us on family adventures, building STEM - focused LEGO robots, or in the middle of a "Project Runway: Toddler Edition" session where I put my crochet and knitting skills to use.
I am always learning, always building, and always ready for a new challenge— especially if it involves coffee, the cloud, or a creative DIY project.

leadership.philosophy: I believe in servant leadership—empowering teams, fostering trust, and enabling growth. My approach is to lead by example, encourage open communication, and celebrate collective wins.
team_successes: Mentored engineers into leadership roles and built a culture of inclusion.
Drove Agile adoption, resulting in faster delivery and higher team morale.
Orchestrated multi-system integrations across 13+ services, optimizing operations.
